channel.title: plex on Colin Murphy's site
channel.description: Recent content in plex on Colin Murphy's site

item.title: Plex Media Server install
item.description: How to install Plex Media Server in a VM/container and provide it access to media files stored on a NAS. Install Intel graphics drivers (hardware transcoding) This is optional, and should only be done if you are using an Intel CPU with Quick Sync Video, which includes all Core i3/i5/i7 CPUs from Sandy Bridge (2nd gen) onwards. Some Atom, Celeron, and Pentium CPUs also support this. Debian Hardware Video Acceleration guide
